step_rationale: I-TAC elevated in ruptured fibrous cap lesions; plaque inflammation and instability.
mechanism: I-TAC is elevated in ruptured atherosclerotic plaques, reflecting leukocyte recruitment and inflammatory destabilization of the fibrous cap.

references.title: Circulating virome and inflammatory proteome in patients with ST-elevation myocardial infarction and primary ventricular fibrillation.
Inflammatory Differences in Plaque Erosion and Rupture in Patients With ST-Segment Elevation Myocardial Infarction.
references.journal: Journal of the American Heart Association
